nodes.summary: Non-kustomization YAML under base/apps/ absent in source → skip/none with allow_delete=True
kustomization.yaml in base/apps/ is NOT protected by the new guard
New skip class visible in plan output with distinct human-readable reason
Predicate is pure: no I/O, no subprocess calls, no external state
reason field on skip entries is unique and grep-isolatable
Fix is additive; existing test coverage for all other path classes passes without modification
ownership=consumer-owned-workload appears in plan output JSON for audit
Consumer manifest absent in source → skip/none/consumer-owned-workload with allow_delete=True
kustomization.yaml absent in source with allow_delete → OPERATION_DELETE, not skip
_is_consumer_owned_workload returns False for paths outside base/apps/
All existing tests in test_upgrade_consumer.py pass without modification
